title: Xucphra Corporation

{{Quote|But you don't have to settle for a life of toil and struggle. Consider the Xucphra corporation, located conveniently on the tropical Inner Rim paradise planet Thyferra. We're always looking for qualified Humans -- and only Humans -- to join the Xucphra team.|Xucphra recruiting message|<ref name="Bacta Basics">{{Wizards|url=default.asp?x=starwars/article/sw20031106thyferra|text=Thyferra: Bacta Basics|int=Thyferra: Bacta Basics}}</ref>}}
The '''Xucphra Corporation''', known simply as '''Xucphra''', was one of two [[Bacta/Legends|bacta]]-producing and distributing corporations in [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]]. The [[Human/Legends|Human]]-controlled company was based on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Thyferra/Legends|Thyferra]].

==History==
In [[44 BBY/Legends|44 BBY]], along with the [[Trade Federation/Legends|Trade Federation]], it was one of the secret instigators of the [[Stark Hyperspace War/Legends|Stark Hyperspace War]]<ref name="Stark" /> and also sabotaged the supply to drive up prices. [[Adol Bel]] was one of Xucphra's directors at that time. The [[Ashern]] used this information in [[32 BBY/Legends|32 BBY]] to discredit Xucphra, and governmental control of [[Thyferra/Legends|Thyferra]] [[Alazhixazha|went to]] the native [[Vratix/Legends|Vratix]]<ref name="TEA">''[[The Essential Atlas]]''</ref> but it continued to be the galaxy's main producer of bacta.<ref name="Stark" />

When the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]] began, Xuphra and [[Zaltin Corporation|Zaltin]] again seized control of the planet.<ref name="TEA" /> In the [[Imperial Era/Legends|Imperial Period]], the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] granted, along with the [[Zaltin Corporation]], the sole rights to produce and market bacta for the entire galaxy.<ref name="Bacta War" /> The two corporations made up a monopoly known as the [[Bacta Cartel/Legends|Bacta Cartel]]. [[Erisi Dlarit]]'s family were involved with Xucphra; her uncle had discovered the contamination introduced in [[Lot ZX1449F]].<ref name="Rogue Squadron">''[[X-Wing: Rogue Squadron]]''</ref>

[[Ysanne Isard]] became [[Head of State/Legends|Head of State]] of Thyferra backed up by Xucphra and she gained control of both the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] and the Xucphra Corporation, which had yielded to Isard and helped to instigate a civil war in the hopes of gaining sole control of the [[Bacta Cartel/Legends|Bacta Cartel]].<ref name="CSWE">{{CSWECite|III|344}}</ref> As a result of the company's assistance in the takeover, Zalxuc City was renamed [[Xucphra City]].<ref name="Bacta War" />

It still existed as of the [[Yuuzhan Vong War]] when it supplied the [[Coronet Hospital]] with bacta.<ref name="Making a Full Recovery">{{Wizards|url=default.asp?x=starwars/article/sw20021003recovery|text=Making a Full ''Recovery''}}</ref>

==Behind the scenes==
In the [[Star Wars: Episode III Revenge of the Sith (video game)|''Episode III'' video game adaption]] for the [[Wikipedia:PlayStation 2|PlayStation 2]] and [[Wikipedia:Xbox|Xbox]], the word XUCPHRA unlocks the cheat Unlimited Health.
